package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
	"log"
)

// scenario for log_printf_for_production: `log.Printf` (stdlib) usage in web service handler code
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario416Positive(values []string) {
	for _, value := range values {
		log.Print(fmt.Sprintf("value=%s", value))
	}
}
